input.background: If a parallel system consists of 3 independent components, each having 0.95 reliability, then the system reliability is given by R=1-(1-0.95)^3=0.9999.
input.question: Let us define f_i(t), F_i(t), and R_i(t) are, respectively, the failure time density, failure time distribution function and reliability function of the ith component. The failure time distribution function of the system is F(t)=P(T_P ≤ t)=∏_{i=1}^n F_i(t).

output.method: 数学计算 - 事件发生概率及独立性
